payload.subject: Re: Spot available for September
payload.body: thanks so much for letting us know — we'd love to accept the spot for september. please let us know what the next steps are and we'll get everything sorted on our end.

parsed.rationale: The email confirms acceptance of the September daycare spot and asks for next steps, which is the natural response — but confidence is moderate since there's no memory context confirming the parent still wants to proceed.
